title: Untitled (Twin Prongs)
description: Two elongated tapered prongs rise from a curved steel base, their sweeping lines suggesting both organic growth and industrial precision.

title: Untitled (Vessel)
description: A round bronze vessel form with serrated edges and a pointed finial, its patinated surface catching warm light through a central vertical opening.

title: Untitled (Glass and Claw)
description: A blown glass orb is cradled by angular steel claws on a dark base, the transparency of glass in tension with the weight of forged metal.

title: Untitled (Diamond Plate)
description: A triangular floor sculpture built from industrial diamond plate steel with serrated edges and an iron wheel, evoking machinery and forward motion.

title: Untitled (Cable Burst)
description: Thick braided steel cables cascade from a dark disc, their twisted strands frozen in mid-flow like a mechanical cascade.

title: Untitled (Lattice Tower)
description: A tall, narrow lattice structure in welded steel, its ladder-like framework tapering to a waist before expanding again — an architectural form in miniature.

title: Untitled (Lantern I)
description: A wall-mounted work where a clear blown glass form is held within a steel armature, evoking an ancient lantern reimagined in sculptural terms.

title: Untitled (Lantern II)
description: A dark, rounded glass form wrapped in a band of woven wire, suspended from a steel handle — mysterious and contained.

title: Untitled (Lantern III)
medium: Forged steel, wire mesh, and frosted glass
description: Two interlocking steel rings frame a frosted glass element wrapped in wire mesh, creating a sculptural object of elegant geometric balance.

title: Wall Triptych (Installation View)
medium: Forged steel, blown glass, wire mesh
description: Three wall-mounted lantern forms displayed together, each combining steel and glass in a distinct variation on the theme of containment and light.
